scripts.cf:dev: npx wrangler pages dev dist --d1 DB=pstbg3shwavep
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep --remote --env production --file=./schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep --remote --env production --file=./seed.sql
scripts.db:migrate:dev: npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep-dev --remote --env preview --file=./schema.sql
scripts.db:seed:dev: npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep-dev --remote --env preview --file=./seed.sql
scripts.db:reset:dev: node scripts/confirm-reset.js dev && npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep-dev --remote --env preview --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tabs;" && npm run db:migrate:dev && npm run db:seed:dev
scripts.db:reset:prod: node scripts/confirm-reset.js prod && npx wrangler d1 execute pstbg3shwavep --remote --env production --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tabs;" && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
